title: RFC 8620 JMAP Core HTTP layer
description: Implement the JMAP Core transport layer in nie-daemon: Session object with urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat capability (session-level value is empty {}; all max* fields and supportedBodyTypes at account-level), batch JSON request handler (POST /jmap), state token infrastructure per-type (ChatContact/Chat/Message/Space), /.well-known/jmap endpoint, uploadUrl and downloadUrl Session templates. State-change EventSource events must include @type:StateChange and use ChatContact not Contact.
